title: cephalaria mauritanica subsp. maroccana
intro: Cephalaria mauritanica subsp. maroccana, also known as Moroccan Cephalaria or Cephalaria, is a perennial plant species within the honeysuckle family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Cephalaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other infections.
